webOnly.title: ⚠️ Vivino Export is WEB ONLY
webOnly.description: Vivino DOES NOT support exporting your cellar from the mobile app. You MUST use a web browser.
webOnly.works: Works: Vivino website (desktop or mobile browser)

prerequisites.title: Before You Start
prerequisites.item1: You need a web browser (desktop or mobile phone browser)
prerequisites.item2: Log into vivino.com (not the mobile app)
prerequisites.item3: Have your Vivino account credentials ready

step1.title: Go to Vivino Website
step1.description: Open your web browser (Safari, Chrome, Firefox, etc.) and navigate to vivino.com. Log in with your Vivino account.
step1.tip: You can do this on desktop or on your phone's browser (Safari, Chrome, etc.), but NOT in the Vivino mobile app.
step1.warning: Do not use the Vivino mobile app - it does not support export.

step2.title: Navigate to My Wines
step2.description: Once logged in, go to your wine list. The exact navigation may vary depending on Vivino's current interface:

option1.title: Option A: Profile Menu
option1.description: Click your profile icon (top right) → "My Wines" or "My Cellar"

step2.tip: Vivino's interface changes occasionally. Look for sections like "My Profile", "My Account", or "My Wines".

howItWorks.title: How Vivino Export Works
howItWorks.description: Vivino allows you to export your data, but it requires a manual request. The Vivino team will prepare your export and notify you when it's ready (usually within 24-48 hours).

substep1.title: Click your profile picture
substep1.description: In the top-right corner of the Vivino website, click on your profile picture or avatar.

substep2.title: Go to Settings → Account Management
substep2.description: From the dropdown menu, select "Settings", then navigate to the "Account Management" tab.

substep3.title: Request data export
substep3.description: Look for "Export your data" section and click "Start an export" or similar button. Vivino will start preparing your data.

substep4.title: Wait for email & download
substep4.description: Vivino will email you when your export is ready (24-48 hours). Return to the same page and click "Ready to download" to get your CSV file.

timing.title: Processing Time
timing.description: Vivino's team manually processes export requests. You'll receive an email when your data is ready to download.

alternative.title: Don't want to wait? Use our template
alternative.description: If you prefer to start immediately or have a small collection, download our CSV template and enter your wines manually:

step4.title: Import to Wine Cellar Brain
step4.description: Once you have your CSV file ready (from the template or another method), import it here:
step4.substep1: Close this guide and click "Choose CSV File"
step4.substep3: We'll auto-detect the columns (or you can map them manually)
step4.substep4: Click "Import Bottles" and we'll add them to your cellar!

success.title: Success!
success.description: Your wines will appear in your cellar. You can edit details, add sommelier notes, and get recommendations.

q1.title: I requested the export but haven't received it yet
q1.answer: Vivino's export process is manual and can take 24-48 hours. Check your email (including spam folder) for a notification from Vivino. If it's been more than 48 hours, you can request again or contact Vivino support.

q2.title: My CSV file isn't importing correctly
q2.answer: Make sure your CSV follows our template format: Wine, Producer, Vintage, Type, Region, Country, Rating, etc. Check for proper comma separation and no special characters that break CSV format.

q3.title: This is too much work - is there an easier way?
q3.answer: Yes! You can add bottles manually one-by-one using our "Add Bottle" feature, or upload photos of wine labels for quick entry. For large collections, the CSV template is still the fastest bulk method.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Because every bottle has a story.
about.p2: My love for wine began the moment I realized it's never just a drink. A bottle of wine carries a story — a grape, a place, a vintage shaped by nature, and a winemaker who made countless decisions before it reached your glass.
about.p3: For me, wine is also about people and moments. Opening the right bottle for a dinner with friends, pairing it with food, and discovering how a wine evolves over time.
about.p4: As my own cellar started growing, I wanted a smarter way to manage it. Something more refined than a spreadsheet, and more thoughtful than the typical cellar apps.
about.p5: That's how Wine Cellar Brain was born.
about.p6: I built it to help wine lovers keep track of their bottles, understand drink windows, and feel confident choosing what to open next.
about.p7: This project is constantly evolving, and I'm always improving it.
about.p8: If you have feedback, ideas, or simply want to share a great bottle you discovered — I'd genuinely love to hear from you.
about.reportBugDesc: Something not working? Let me know

[Describe what went wrong]

---
App version: {{version}}
Platform: {{platform}}

whatIs.question: What is Wine Cellar Brain?
whatIs.answer: Wine Cellar Brain is a personal wine collection manager with AI-powered recommendations. It helps you catalog your bottles, track drink windows, and decide what to open next — all in a beautifully simple interface.

addBottles.question: How do I add bottles to my cellar?
addBottles.answer: Tap the "+" button from your cellar view, or use the camera button in the bottom navigation bar to scan a label. You can add bottles manually by filling in the details, or use the smart scan feature to import from a photo or CSV file. Wine data is enriched automatically where possible.

pwa.question: Does it work as an app (PWA)?
pwa.answer: Yes. Wine Cellar Brain is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can install it on your iPhone, Android device, or desktop by using "Add to Home Screen" from your browser menu. Once installed, it works smoothly offline.

drinkWindow.question: How does the 'Drink Window' feature work?
drinkWindow.answer: A drink window is the optimal period to enjoy a wine. When you add a bottle with a vintage year, the app estimates the ideal drinking window based on the wine's style and structure — helping you avoid opening bottles too early or too late.

privacy.question: Is my cellar private?
privacy.answer: Yes, your cellar is private by default. Only you can see your bottles. You can optionally share a read-only view with others using the share feature, but nothing is public without your explicit action.

contactSupport.question: How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer: Use the "Email support" button below — it opens your mail app with a pre-filled message so you can reach us in seconds. We typically respond within 1–2 business days.

import.question: Can I import my existing wine list?
import.answer: Yes. Wine Cellar Brain supports CSV import (Vivino-compatible format). Download the template from the import screen, fill in your wines, and upload it to bulk-add your collection in seconds.

aiRecs.question: How are AI recommendations generated?
aiRecs.answer: The app analyses your cellar — bottle styles, regions, vintages, and drink windows — and suggests what to open tonight based on the occasion, food pairing, and which bottles are at their peak.
